lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਬੀਹਾ ਬੇਨਤੀ ਕਰੇ ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਦੇਹੁ ਜੀਅ ਦਾਨ ॥
lines.translit: baabeehaa benatee kare kar kirapaa dehu jeea daan |
lines.english: The rainbird prays: O Lord, grant Your Grace, and bless me with the gift of the life of the soul.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਲ ਬਿਨੁ ਪਿਆਸ ਨ ਊਤਰੈ ਛੁਟਕਿ ਜਾਂਹਿ ਮੇਰੇ ਪ੍ਰਾਨ ॥
lines.translit: jal bin piaas na aootarai chhuttak jaanhi mere praan |
lines.english: Without the water, my thirst is not quenched, and my breath of life is ended and gone.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਬਖਸਿ ਲਏ ਅੰਤਿ ਬੇਲੀ ਹੋਇ ਭਗਵਾਨੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak guramukh bakhas le ant belee hoe bhagavaan |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Gurmukh is forgiven; in the end, the Lord God shall be your only friend. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਸੁਖਦਾਤਾ ਬੇਅੰਤੁ ਹੈ ਗੁਣਦਾਤਾ ਨੇਧਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: too sukhadaataa beant hai gunadaataa nedhaan |
lines.english: You are the Giver of peace, O Infinite Lord God; You are the Giver of the treasure of virtue.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਜਗਤੁ ਉਪਾਇ ਕੈ ਗੁਣ ਅਉਗਣ ਕਰੇ ਬੀਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: aape jagat upaae kai gun aaugan kare beechaar |
lines.english: He created the world; He considers the merits and demerits of the mortals.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਛੋਡਿ ਅਉਗਣ ਕਮਾਵਦੇ ਦਰਗਹ ਹੋਹਿ ਖੁਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: gun chhodd aaugan kamaavade daragah hohi khuaar |
lines.english: Forsaking virtue, they practice evil; they shall be miserable in the Court of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰੈ ਗੁਣ ਸਰਬ ਜੰਜਾਲੁ ਹੈ ਨਾਮਿ ਨ ਧਰੇ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: trai gun sarab janjaal hai naam na dhare piaar |
lines.english: Those who are entangled in the three gunas - the three dispositions - do not love the Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੂਐ ਜਨਮੁ ਤਿਨੀ ਹਾਰਿਆ ਕਿਤੁ ਆਏ ਸੰਸਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: jooai janam tinee haariaa kit aae sansaar |
lines.english: They lose their life in the gamble; why did they even come into the world?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਮਨੁ ਮਾਰਿਆ ਅਹਿਨਿਸਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਪਿਆਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: sachai sabad man maariaa ahinis naam piaar |
lines.english: But those who conquer and subdue their minds, through the True Word of the Shabad - night and day, they love the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੀ ਪੁਰਖੀ ਉਰਿ ਧਾਰਿਆ ਸਚਾ ਅਲਖ ਅਪਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: jinee purakhee ur dhaariaa sachaa alakh apaar |
lines.english: Those people enshrine the True, Invisible and Infinite Lord in their hearts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਗੁਣਦਾਤਾ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਹਹਿ ਅਸੀ ਅਵਗਣਿਆਰ ॥
lines.translit: too gunadaataa nidhaan heh asee avaganiaar |
lines.english: You, O Lord, are the Giver, the Treasure of virtue; I am unvirtuous and unworthy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਤਿ ਨ ਵਿਹਾਵੀ ਸਾਕਤਾਂ ਜਿਨੑਾ ਵਿਸਰੈ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: raat na vihaavee saakataan jinaa visarai naau |
lines.english: The faithless cynics forget the Name of the Lord; the night of their lives does not pass in peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਬਖਸੇ ਸੋ ਪਾਇਸੀ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਵੀਚਾਰੁ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: jis bakhase so paaeisee gurasabadee veechaar |13|
lines.english: He alone finds You, whom You bless and forgive, and inspire to contemplate the Word of the Guru's Shabad. ||13||

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਤਨ ਜਵੇਹਰ ਮਾਣਕਾ ਹਭੇ ਮਣੀ ਮਥੰਨਿ ॥
lines.translit: ratan javehar maanakaa habhe manee mathan |
lines.english: All sorts of jewels and gems, diamonds and rubies, shine forth from their foreheads.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਤੀ ਦਿਨਸ ਸੁਹੇਲੀਆ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਂਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: raatee dinas suheleea naanak har gun gaanau |1|
lines.english: Their days and nights become comfortable, O Nanak, singing the Glorious Praises of the Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜੋ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਭਾਣਿਆ ਸਚੈ ਦਰਿ ਸੋਹੰਨਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak jo prabh bhaaniaa sachai dar sohan |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, those who are pleasing to God, look beautiful in the Court of the Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਿ ਸਚੁ ਸਮੑਾਲਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: sachaa satigur sev sach samaaliaa |
lines.english: Serving the True Guru, I dwell on the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੋਹਿ ਨ ਸਕੈ ਜਮਕਾਲੁ ਸਚਾ ਰਖਵਾਲਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: pohi na sakai jamakaal sachaa rakhavaaliaa |
lines.english: The Messenger of Death cannot even touch that person who is protected by the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਿ ਖਲੋਆ ਆਇ ਜਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਅਗੈ ਘਾਲਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: ant khaloaa aae ji satigur agai ghaaliaa |
lines.english: The work you have done for the True Guru shall be very useful in the end.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਵਿਣੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਕੂੜਿਆਰ ਫਿਰਹਿ ਬੇਤਾਲਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh vin naavai koorriaar fireh betaaliaa |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs are false; without the Name, they wander around like demons.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਸੂ ਮਾਣਸ ਚੰਮਿ ਪਲੇਟੇ ਅੰਦਰਹੁ ਕਾਲਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: pasoo maanas cham palette andarahu kaaliaa |
lines.english: They are nothing more than beasts, wrapped up in human skin; they are black-hearted within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਸਾਖੀ ਜੋਤਿ ਜਗਾਇ ਦੀਵਾ ਬਾਲਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: gur saakhee jot jagaae deevaa baaliaa |
lines.english: Lighting the lamp of the Guru's Teachings, my awareness has been awakened.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੋ ਵਰਤੈ ਸਚੁ ਸਚੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਨਿਹਾਲਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: sabho varatai sach sachai sabad nihaaliaa |
lines.english: The True Lord is pervading all; through the True Word of the Shabad, He is seen.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਹੈ ਪੂਰੈ ਗੁਰਿ ਦੇਖਾਲਿਆ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: naanak naam nidhaan hai poorai gur dekhaaliaa |14|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Naam is the greatest treasure. The Perfect Guru has revealed it to me. ||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਬੀਹੈ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਪਛਾਣਿਆ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਹਜਿ ਸੁਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: baabeehai hukam pachhaaniaa gur kai sehaj subhaae |
lines.english: The rainbird realizes the Hukam of the Lord's Command with intuitive ease through the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਘੁ ਵਰਸੈ ਦਇਆ ਕਰਿ ਗੂੜੀ ਛਹਬਰ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: megh varasai deaa kar goorree chhahabar laae |
lines.english: The clouds mercifully burst forth, and the rain pours down in torrents.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਬੀਹੇ ਕੂਕ ਪੁਕਾਰ ਰਹਿ ਗਈ ਸੁਖੁ ਵਸਿਆ ਮਨਿ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: baabeehe kook pukaar reh gee sukh vasiaa man aae |
lines.english: The cries and wailings of the rainbird have ceased, and peace has come to abide in its mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਾਤ੍ਰਿਕ ਤੂ ਨ ਜਾਣਹੀ ਕਿਆ ਤੁਧੁ ਵਿਚਿ ਤਿਖਾ ਹੈ ਕਿਤੁ ਪੀਤੈ ਤਿਖ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: chaatrik too na jaanahee kiaa tudh vich tikhaa hai kit peetai tikh jaae |
lines.english: O rainbird, you do not know what thirst is within you, or what you can drink to quench it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸੋ ਸਾਲਾਹੀਐ ਜਿ ਦੇਂਦਾ ਸਭਨਾਂ ਜੀਆ ਰਿਜਕੁ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak so saalaaheeai ji dendaa sabhanaan jeea rijak samaae |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, praise that Lord, who reaches out and gives sustenance to all beings and creatures. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ਭਰੰਮਿਆ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਜਲੁ ਪਲੈ ਨ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: doojai bhaae bharamiaa amrit jal palai na paae |
lines.english: You wander in the love of duality, and you do not obtain the Ambrosial Water.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇ ਜੇ ਆਪਣੀ ਤਾਂ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਸੁਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: nadar kare je aapanee taan satigur milai subhaae |
lines.english: When God casts His Glance of Grace, then the mortal automatically meets the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਜਲੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਸਹਜੇ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak satigur te amrit jal paaeaa sahaje rahiaa samaae |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Ambrosial Water is obtained from the True Guru, and then the mortal remains merged in the Lord with intuitive ease. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਪਾਲਾ ਕਕਰੁ ਭੰਨਿ ਸੀਤਲੁ ਜਲੁ ਹੇਂਵਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: eik paalaa kakar bhan seetal jal henvahee |
lines.english: Some, in the dead of winter, break the ice and immerse themselves in freezing water.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਵਣ ਖੰਡਿ ਬੈਸਹਿ ਜਾਇ ਸਦੁ ਨ ਦੇਵਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: eik van khandd baiseh jaae sad na devahee |
lines.english: Some go and sit in the forest realms, and do not answer any calls.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਭਸਮ ਚੜੑਾਵਹਿ ਅੰਗਿ ਮੈਲੁ ਨ ਧੋਵਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: eik bhasam charraaveh ang mail na dhovahee |
lines.english: Some rub ashes on their bodies, and never wash off their dirt.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਜਟਾ ਬਿਕਟ ਬਿਕਰਾਲ ਕੁਲੁ ਘਰੁ ਖੋਵਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: eik jattaa bikatt bikaraal kul ghar khovahee |
lines.english: Some look hideous, with their uncut hair matted and dishevelled. They bring dishonor to their family and ancestry.
